emails.subject: Calpine deal summary
emails.body: Ben, Could you forward to me name and phone number of EE&CC person who you are contacting to get VOM? I will give it to Thomas in case he wants to give him a call. Thanks. Jin Forwarded by Jinsung Myung/Corp/Enron on 02/23/2000 07:22 AM Jinsung Myung 02/22/2000 07:31 PM
